privileged_info_summary: OWASP Juice Shop is built with Angular SPA frontend, Express.js Node.js backend, and SQLite relational database. The system includes authentication via JWT tokens, integrates with Stripe for payment processing, and supports file uploads for user content. STRIDE threat modeling includes six categories: Spoofing, Tampering, Repudiation, Information Disclosure, Denial of Service, and Elevation of Privilege. The task requires a two-page draw.io diagram with minimum 6 shapes, 8 data flow edges, and 2 trust boundaries. The architecture document provided is synthetically generated by the task setup script rather than from actual Juice Shop source code.
